checks.topic: KB payout arithmetic self-consistency: 합산장해율 40% applied to both KB products (p6: 50,000,000×40%=20,000,000; p7: 100,000,000×40%=40,000,000)

warnings: CHK-18 (RAISED as CONFLICT_1, verdict pending): injury mechanism is described two mutually-exclusive ways across the case's own sources — 계단 낙상/fall-on-stairs (의료자문 p1; 교보 손해사정서 p4) vs KB 재해원인 coded field '무리한 동작'/strenuous-movement (KB 지급설명서 p6 and p7). Promoted from an upstream review-flag to a P6 conflict because this is a categorical same-fact contradiction (either/or, not a tolerance spread) and is load-bearing: the 재해/일반상해 성립 rests on '급격하고 우발적인 외래의 사고'(교보 p4), and a coded 무리한 동작 on BOTH KB 지급설명서 could be used to characterize the event as exertional — directly relevant to the 기왕증(골다공증) 감액 / 장해지급률 dispute that is the case's core. KB paid the 후유장해 benefit anyway, so no closed-case payout hinged on it, but the contradiction is unresolved on the face of the documents and must not be silently carried forward as settled '계단 낙상'. Both readings preserved with attribution; human sets verdict.

CHK-17 (NOT raised — left as review flag): 2025-04-05 Cobb-angle discrepancy 후만각 35.7°/변형 22.4°(의료자문 p3) vs 콥스앵글 40.2°/기형 38°(교보 p4). Judged NOT a genuine same-fact contradiction after independent check: (1) the raw Cobb angles differ 35.7° vs 40.2° = 4.5°, within commonly-cited ~5° inter-observer Cobb variance; (2) the larger 22.4° vs 38° gap is two DIFFERENT derived quantities, not the same fact measured twice — 의료자문's 22.4° = post-accident 35.7° minus this patient's own 2023-11-13 baseline 후만각 13.3° (p2), whereas 교보's 38° is net over a generic physiological curve (~40.2°−2°); (3) both reach the identical clinical/coverage conclusion (척주 심한 기형, 지급률 50%), so nothing downstream branches on the difference. Consistent with upstream's review_required routing to 의사; not a P6 standoff. Kept as review flag for 의사 confirmation.

CHK-15 (NOT raised — note only): fracture level. 의료자문(p1) affirmatively states T12 acute fracture and '그 외 추가적인 척추체 골절 소견은 관찰되지 않음' (no other vertebral fracture); KB 지급설명서(p6/p7) diagnosis reads 'T11 및 T12 부위의 골절'. Not raised because the KB text is a free-text diagnosis WITHOUT a KCD code and 'T11 및 T12 부위' most plausibly reads as a thoracolumbar-junction REGION descriptor rather than an asserted separate T11 fracture — corroborated by BOTH 의료자문 AND 교보 using T11's upper endplate as an INTACT reference for the Cobb measurement (a fractured T11 would not serve as a stable reference). Also already folded into upstream's primary/secondary diagnosis labeling. Left for 의사 confirmation that T11 is intact; does not change any coverage outcome (골절진단비 paid on the T12 fracture regardless).

CHK-9 (NOT raised — different scope, note only): 교보(p4) documents a specific 6-day acute admission (2024.05.05~05.10) plus a separate 1-day ER stay; KB(p6) paid 상해입원일당 on a 48-day basis (20,000×48=960,000). No source states a TOTAL hospitalization figure that 48 contradicts — 교보's 6일 is one acute-surgical admission (교보 was not adjudicating 입원일당), and KB's 48 days is most plausibly cumulative inpatient days across the whole claim, which are not itemized in-pack. Flagged for 손해사정사 to confirm the 48-day basis against KB's underlying 입원확인 records; not a same-fact contradiction.

OUT OF SCOPE for this stage (not evaluated as a cross-source P6 check, per task instruction): the 장해지급률 50%(의료자문/교보) vs 40.00 합산장해율 KB-paid gap is an insurer-vs-evidence reduction (기왕증 감액) — Phase-2 denial-validation's analytical purpose, NOT an internal cross-source contradiction. The S22090-primary / S2207·M4806-secondary diagnosis-code labeling was already structurally handled upstream by claim-analysis's primary-diagnosis rule and is not re-raised.

Single-document case (DOC_001 only, a 7-page mixed evidence pack: 의료자문 pp1-3 / 교보 손해사정서 pp4-5 / KB 지급설명서 pp6-7). 'Cross-source' checks are cross-sub-document / cross-page within DOC_001; all sources attributed to DOC_001 with page. No policy documents in-pack, so no 약관-clause consistency checks were possible.
